calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. Cohen Law Office, 800-492-2657 for plaintiff and opposing party Deutsche Bank Trust Company. No other appearance.

Plaintiff submitted to the tentative. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NANCY MCGOURTY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 5 days leave to amend. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
